title: Items being created via automation and not having links
excerpt: I’m trying to have automation create items.  Some of the items I would like to have a link to a document populated in the item when it is created.  I have the Link column in my board, and when I’m in the automation secti…

posts.author: benjamin.clark (Ben Clark)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m trying to have automation create items. Some of the items I would like to have a link to a document populated in the item when it is created. I have the Link column in my board, and when I’m in the automation section, I put the link in the details to create for the item. However, every time the item is created, the link to the document is not there. Any suggestions?

posts.author: psperry (Accidental Selfie )
posts.cookedHtml:
I wonder if items created by automation has some issues. I just posted about a similar issue:

Automation: Create Item, Files not copying to new item Platform discussions
I have an automation that looks like below. When triggered, it does a few things, one of them is to create a new item on another board with the info in the current item. The problem is that the files (documents) almost never propagate to the new item and I am left copying them manually. This is a relatively new development. Any help will be appreciated. [AC60A862-D7E6-4768-AA7F-24C0BCF80918]
